name: rmbc_copy_audit
description: Score copy against the RMBC framework (Research, Mechanism, Brief, Copy) with per-dimension scoring, letter grades, and actionable recommendations.

copy_text.description: The copy to audit (ad, VSL script, email, landing page, etc.).

copy_type.description: Format hint: ad, vsl, email, landing_page, advertorial. Default: auto-detect.

context.description: Target audience, product, offer details — improves Research scoring accuracy.
